Metadata.title: Alvestrasza Corporation
Metadata.description: Alvestrasza Corporation provides IT services and prepares structured technical education.

hero.mission: Alvestrasza Corporation provides IT services and prepares structured technical education for secure, maintainable infrastructure.

itServices.title: IT Service
itServices.description: Support for secure, maintainable and clearly documented infrastructure.

academy.title: Academy
academy.description: Structured courses and workshops are being prepared and will later be provided through an LMS.

documentation.title: Documentation
documentation.description: Technical decisions, responsibilities and operational paths are documented clearly.

operations.title: Operations
operations.description: Focused on stable systems, clear responsibilities and realistic operating models.

focus.title: IT services with clear documentation and reliable implementation.
focus.text: The current public focus is IT service, technical consulting and the preparation of an Academy structure for courses and workshops.
focus.cardText: Prepared for traceable, maintainable and security-conscious implementation.

documentation.title: Documentation first.
documentation.text: Operational clarity is part of the design: configuration, responsibilities and verification paths are treated as core parts of technical services.

academy.title: Courses and workshops in preparation.
academy.text: The Academy is being prepared. Participants should later be able to attend structured courses and workshops through an LMS.

metadata.title: Contact
metadata.description: Contact information for Alvestrasza Corporation and mail operations.

ContactPage.title: Responsible contact information.
ContactPage.lead: Public contact information for Alvestrasza Corporation, including responsible mail operations.

company.title: Company
company.statusNote: The company is currently in the process of being formally established. A full postal business address will be published once finalized.

statement.title: Legitimate business and transactional e-mail only.
statement.text1: The mail system is intended for legitimate business communication, transactional service e-mails, account verification, notifications and administrative communication.
statement.text2: The system is not operated as an open relay. Mail routing, sender authorization and reverse DNS information are maintained through public DNS records.
statement.text3: Newsletter or bulk mail will only be sent after explicit recipient opt-in. Purchased, harvested or third-party address lists are not used.

metadata.description: IT service offering of Alvestrasza Corporation.

ItServicePage.title: IT Service
ItServicePage.lead: A service area for reliable infrastructure operations, secure identity integration, technical documentation and operational enablement.
ItServicePage.cardText: Service details are being prepared and will be published as the operating model matures.
